query: SELECT pa.id, pa.patientId, pa.protocolId, pa.status, pa.startDate, p.name as protocolName, pt.firstName, pt.lastName FROM protocol_assignments pa JOIN protocols p ON pa.protocolId = p.id JOIN patients pt ON pa.patientId = pt.id ORDER BY pa.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT pa.id, pa.patientId, pa.protocolId, pa.status, pa.startDate, p.name as protocolName, pt.firstName, pt.lastName FROM protocol_assignments pa JOIN protocols p ON pa.protocolId = p.id JOIN patients pt ON pa.patientId = pt.id ORDER BY pa.createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
